readings.Aries: You are capable of more gentleness than you usually show. Today would be a good day for it. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Taurus: You know what you need. You have always known. The difficulty is in asking for it directly. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Gemini: Your wit is a gift. It's also where you go when you don't want to be known. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Cancer: The person you've been nurturing needs you to need them back. Allow it. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Leo: The pride that keeps you from asking for help is not protecting you from anything real. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Virgo: There is a question about yourself that your analysis keeps circling. Land on it. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Libra: The position you hold in other people's lives is one of grace. Don't let it become one of function. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Scorpio: The wound is real. It is also not the whole story about you. Let this one be easy.
readings.Sagittarius: Your generosity of spirit is real and sometimes extended to people who don't respect it. Discern. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Capricorn: You process emotions through action. Today, the emotion needs to be felt, not solved. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Aquarius: The idea is genuinely good. The execution requires other people. Let them in. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Pisces: You see people at their most essential. Let someone see you that way too. Sleep on it before committing.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
